Article.ArticleTitle: Functional Training and Blood Flow Restriction: A Perspective View on the Integration of Techniques.

AffiliationInfo.Affiliation: Functional Training Group, Federal University of Sergipe, Aracajú, Brazil.
Functional Training Group, Federal University of Sergipe, Aracajú, Brazil.
School of Human Kinetics and Recreation, Memorial University of Newfoundland, St. John's, NL, Canada.
Department of Health, Exercise Science, and Recreation Management, University of Mississippi, Oxford, MS, United States.
Obesity Study Group (GEO), Federal University of São Paulo, Santos, Brazil.
